name: Lü Chang
page_title: Lü Chang 呂常 [Liu Yan] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives
historical_notes:
Lü Chang, born in Nanyang, served under Liu Yan. When Liu Yan was appointed Governor of Yi in AD 188 Lü Chang accompanied him. He died in the early 190s. (1)

1) Sanguozhi: Shu 9

full_text:
Lü Chang 呂常
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lü Chang (呂常)was born in Nanyang. Father of Lü Yi (Jiyang). He served Liu Yan and followed him into Yizhou. Lü Chang was affiliated with Liu Yan. Lü Chang lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
